instruction: I need the New York release setup back in shape. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, repair the stale next step, refresh the handoff file, and leave the sync and next step correctly set.
canonical_instruction: I need the New York release setup cleaned up. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, fix the stale next step, refresh the handoff file, and leave the sync and next step correctly set.
instruction_variants: Something's off in the New York release setup. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, fix the stale next step, update the handoff file, and leave the next step and sync correctly set.

The New York release setup has something stale in it. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, repair the stale next step, refresh the handoff file, and leave the next step and sync correctly set.

Something in the New York release setup is off. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, fix the stale next step, update the handoff file, and leave the next step and sync correctly set.

The New York release setup needs a cleanup pass. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, repair the stale next step, refresh the handoff file, and leave the next step and sync correctly set.

I need the New York release setup cleaned up. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, fix the stale next step, refresh the handoff file, and leave the sync and next step correctly set.

Something in the New York release setup is stale. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, repair the stale next step, refresh the handoff file, and leave the sync and next step correctly set.

The New York release setup still has one stale detail in it. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, fix the stale next step, refresh the handoff file, and leave the sync and next step correctly set.

solution_commands: file create --path '/ops/release-handoff.txt' --content 'New York refreshed release handoff notes.'
tasks complete --title 'Existing New York release follow-up'
tasks add --title 'New York release follow-through' --priority high --due 2026-03-10
